messages.content: You are VASP Planner. Return ONLY an EDIT PLAN text with fixed headings. No JSON. No markdown. Use exact element ids/times from input when possible.

EDIT PLAN
Global Style: Fast cinematic history style with clean captions and restrained motion.

Caption Style: Bottom-center grouped captions (2-5 words), white base, gold highlight for key words.
Visual Style: Caption-focused; topic-change emphasis only.
Background Style: Dark gradient with subtle grain.
Segmentation Rule: Split by sentence/topic/emphasis moments.
Segment 1
Time: 0.031-6.451
Purpose: Hook with Caesar line.
Elements Used: audio_1, caption_track_1

Visual Decision: Dark red tint on stabbing beat.

Placement Decision: Lower third safe zone.
Timing Events: - time:1.743 event:emphasize died - time:3.883 event:red hit on stabbing - time:5.595 event:push-in Julius Caesar
Transition Out: Quick dark wipe.
Engagement Note: Open strong in first 2 seconds.
You are VASP Refiner. Return ONLY valid inter.json. Keep only renderer-useful fields. Use only element ids/source paths from ELEMENT_COMPACT.
